candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents proxy; values reconcile to ending cash on cash flow statement.
Ending cash from cash flow statement, but target should come from balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Chose balance-sheet cash label as requested; it matches cash flow ending balance values.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct total for short-term debt/current debt; likely already aggregates current borrowings, avoiding need to sum components.

candidates.row_label: Current Maturities Of Long Term Debt
candidates.why: Valid component of STD if no total exists, but likely only one part of short-term debt here.
Appears duplicate of current maturities of long-term debt, not a separate additional component.
Could be a component of ST Debt rather than a standalone total; selecting with ST Debt would risk double counting.

variables.notes: Selected 'ST Debt' outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest reported total for short-term debt. Excluded lease items and avoided double counting against maturities/components.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Best available total property, plant and equipment line; under IFRS this commonly represents total net PPE.
Would be ideal gross PPE label, but appears blank in preview and may not be the usable reported series.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Candidate list item, but not PPE.

variables.notes: Chose 'Tangibles' outside the shortlist as the best total PPE proxy; preferred over component lines and over the blank gross PPE label.

candidates.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities
candidates.why: Direct match for net cash flow from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: Changes in Operating Assets and Liabilities
candidates.why: Only a component of operating cash flow, not total OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: As Reported Cash fr Operating Activities

variables.notes: Clear operating cash flow total on cash flow statement.
